title: Combat Hitboxes+
description: A powerful fork of the original Combat Hitboxes mod. Focuses on customization, weapon filters and smart targeting.
body:
# Combat Hitboxes+
[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Source_Code-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/TrueWulf/combat-hitboxes-plus) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/combat-hitboxes-plus?style=for-the-badge&color=00AF5C&label=Downloads&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-hitboxes-plus) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/TrueWulf/combat-hitboxes-plus?style=for-the-badge&color=orange)](https://github.com/TrueWulf/combat-hitboxes-plus/blob/main/LICENSE)
--- **Combat Hitboxes+** is a powerful and optimized fork of the original mod by **sootysplash**. It provides advanced control over hitbox visibility and aesthetics to help you focus on combat without visual clutter. ## 🚀 Main Features: * **Weapon Filter:** You can configure the mod to show hitboxes ONLY when you are holding specific weapons like Swords, Axes, Maces, or Tridents. No more hitboxes blocking your view when you are just building or mining! * **Smart Targeting:** The hitbox color dynamically changes when an entity is within your actual attack reach, providing instant visual feedback for better combat timing. * **Advanced Customization:** Fully reorganized configuration menu with separate categories for colors, line widths, and behavior settings. * **Minimalist & Fast:** Built on top of Linux optimized environment to ensure zero performance impact. ### 📌 Requirements To work properly, this mod requires: [![Fabric API](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric_API-Required-yellow?style=flat-square&logo=fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [![Cloth Config](https://img.shields.io/badge/Cloth_Config-Required-blue?style=flat-square&logo=minecraft)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [![Mod Menu](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod_Menu-Optional-brightgreen?style=flat-square&logo=minecraft)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) ## 📜 Credits: * This project is a fork of the original [Combat Hitboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-hitboxes) mod. * Huge thanks to [sootysplash](https://modrinth.com/user/sootysplash) for the original work and inspiration.
